title: Thai Style Chicken Curry with Courgette & Fragrant Rice
description: Creamy, fragrant Thai red curry with tender diced chicken and courgette simmered in coconut milk, served over lime-zested jasmine rice.

steps.instruction: Bring 300ml salted water to a boil; add rice, cover, simmer for 12 minutes, then rest covered for 12 minutes.
Cube courgette (1cm pieces), slice onion thinly, deseed and slice chilli, and zest the lime.
Heat oil in a large pan over medium-high; brown chicken for 3–4 minutes, then add onion and courgette for 2 more minutes.
Add Thai spice mix, curry paste, and half the chilli; cook 30 seconds, then pour in coconut milk.
Simmer for 8–10 minutes until chicken is cooked through; squeeze in lime juice and season.
Fluff rice with lime zest, ladle curry over the top, and garnish with remaining chilli slices.
